// note: EXAMPLE — merge the `gitlab` server block into your own MCP config (VS Code: .vscode/mcp.json, or user settings). Do NOT copy this file over an existing .vscode/mcp.json — you'd clobber other servers. USE_GITLAB_WIKI/USE_MILESTONE=false drop ~20 tools; USE_PIPELINE=true is on so review-mr can read MR pipeline status — the agent's tools: list loads only the 2 pipeline tools it needs, so context stays small. Set GITLAB_READ_ONLY_MODE=false for the review-mr agent's approve/reply/resolve actions.
